title: OCI VCN Security List Open to World
description: Detects creation or update of a Security List allowing ingress from 0.0.0.0/0.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ((('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.virtualnetwork.createsecuritylist' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.virtualnetwork.updatesecuritylist') and 'HTTP Method' = 'POST' and 'Original Log Content' like '*0.0.0.0/0*'))
falsepositives: Network infrastructure changes during maintenance windows
